title: Dubai clarifies token issuance rules for RWAs and stablecoins
message_html: Dubai clarifies token issuance rules for RWAs and stablecoins ...
snippet: Dubai’s regulator issued new guidance placing token launches into three buckets, tightening disclosure and governance standards for stablecoins, RWAs and other digital assets.

title: Bithumb launches legal action to recover 7 Bitcoin from payout error
message_html: Bithumb launches legal action to recover 7 Bitcoin from payout error ...
snippet: South Korean crypto exchange Bithumb files for a court-approved asset freeze to reclaim 7 BTC remaining from a February payout error.
